title: SK Hynix's $26.5 Billion US Listing Brought to Telegram Users via xStocks
summary: SK Hynix's $26.5 billion US listing is now accessible to Telegram users through tokenized shares on the Solana blockchain, available via Backpack, xStocks, and Ondo Finance.
body:
SK Hynix, a major semiconductor supplier, has tokenized its shares on the Solana blockchain, making them accessible to Telegram users. This move allows investors to acquire fractional shares of the company's $26.5 billion US listing through decentralized platforms.

The tokenized shares can be purchased and managed via Backpack, xStocks, and Ondo Finance. This initiative aims to democratize access to traditional financial markets by leveraging blockchain technology, enabling users to trade shares directly from their Telegram accounts.

For everyday investors, this development lowers the barrier to entry for participating in high-value stock listings. It also provides a more accessible and user-friendly way to engage with traditional financial instruments using familiar messaging platforms.

This collaboration between traditional finance and blockchain technology highlights the growing trend of tokenizing real-world assets. As more companies explore similar initiatives, we can expect increased liquidity and accessibility in global markets. Investors should keep an eye on the performance and adoption of these tokenized assets, as they could become a mainstream investment tool in the near future.
twitterThread: SK Hynix's $26.5B US listing is now on Solana, accessible via Telegram. Fractional shares available through xStocks, Backpack, and Ondo Finance.
Tokenized shares bring traditional stock listings to the blockchain, making them easier to trade. No need for a brokerage account—just your Telegram app.

This could be a game-changer for retail investors. Watch how tokenized assets perform and whether more companies follow suit. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-11-sk-hynix-shares-tokenized-on-solana-for-telegram-users
